completed_tasks.name: Repair Phase 09 planning package
completed_tasks.progress: Re-split Phase 09 into 10 smaller plans, restored VALIDATION.md, synced ROADMAP/STATE, and resolved RESEARCH open questions.

completed_tasks.name: Re-run plan checker until green
completed_tasks.progress: Fixed wave numbering, Effect guard verification coverage, inverted forbidden-pattern checks, and PowerShell-safe validation commands. Final result: VERIFICATION PASSED.

remaining_tasks.name: 09-01 Task 1 - Freeze content.pages branch contract and folder layout
09-01 Task 2 - Freeze content.chunks branch contract without vector leakage

blockers.description: Worktree is dirty with unrelated and user-owned changes. Resume work must avoid reverting or bundling those changes accidentally.
blockers.workaround: Read touched files before editing, commit handoff separately, and keep implementation changes scoped to the active Phase 09 plan.

decisions.decision: Use domain-grouped BrainStoreTree with content/pages, content/chunks, graph/links, graph/timeline, retrieval/search, retrieval/embedding, ops/lifecycle, ops/internal.
decisions.rationale: This was the locked user direction from discuss-phase and the completed split-brainstore todo.

decisions.decision: Keep flat BrainStore only as a temporary compat-over-tree adapter.
decisions.rationale: Internal architecture must move to tree-first while StoreProvider and Promise-facing callers remain stable.

decisions.decision: Each branch folder uses interface + factory + index and later siblings depend only on narrow contracts.
decisions.rationale: This is required by the repaired Phase 09 context and is now encoded in the 10-plan execution split.

decisions.decision: All verification commands in planning docs must be PowerShell-safe and Effect-aware.
decisions.rationale: Checker failed on bash-style && and missing check-effect-v4 usage, so this must be preserved on resume.

next_action: Read 09-CONTEXT.md, 09-RESEARCH.md, 09-PATTERNS.md, 09-VALIDATION.md, then start 09-01-PLAN.md Task 1 by creating src/store/brainstore/content/pages/{interface,factory,index}.ts without importing the broad BrainStore root.
context_notes: We paused immediately after repairing the planning layer, not mid-implementation. Phase 09 now has a checker-passed 10-plan structure and should resume with execution from 09-01. The main risk on resume is mixing implementation with unrelated dirty-worktree files or reintroducing flat-root assumptions/power-shell-invalid verify commands.
